	DISTANCE_TO_CYCLE_RICKSHAW_MANUAL VARCHAR(50),
	DISTANCE_TO_CYCLE_RICKSHAW_MACHINE VARCHAR(50),
	DISTANCE_TO_ANIMAL_CARTS VARCHAR(50),
